creator: mph@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Imported with minor changes: 

- graphics/Mesa is now graphics/Mesa2 or Mesa3.  I changed the 
LIB_DEPENDS to allow either, and build Mesa3 if necessary. 

- Removed x11 from CATEGORIES line; it only needs to be there if 
the port would logically fit into /usr/ports/x11 (which is being 
split up, anyway).  As of yesterday or so, USE_X11=yes is the 
way to say a port needs X libraries. 

- patch-aa had a literal /usr/local, changed to $(LOCALBASE). 

Thanks!  This program makes me wish I had a 3dfx card.
